name: Wicked
description: Stephen Schwartz's hit musical reimagining The Wizard of Oz from the witches' point of view — stage and 2024 film

questions.q: Who directed the 2024 film adaptation of Wicked?

source.notes: Also directed Crazy Rich Asians and In the Heights.

questions.q: Who plays Elphaba, the green-skinned witch, in the 2024 film Wicked?

source.notes: An EGOT contender; won a Tony for The Color Purple.

questions.q: Which pop star plays Glinda in the 2024 Wicked film?

source.notes: Cast after a long, public campaign to land the role.

questions.q: Which Tony-winning composer wrote the music and lyrics for the Wicked stage musical?

source.notes: Also wrote Godspell and Pippin.

questions.q: Whose 1995 novel was the basis for the musical?

source.notes: Subtitled 'The Life and Times of the Wicked Witch of the West.'

questions.q: Which iconic song ends Act 1 of Wicked with Elphaba soaring into the sky?

source.notes: Now a rite-of-passage audition piece for many singers.

questions.q: In what fictional land is Wicked set?

source.notes: A prequel/reimagining of L. Frank Baum's world.

questions.q: Who originated the role of Elphaba on Broadway in 2003?

source.notes: Won a Tony Award for the performance.

questions.q: Who originated the role of Glinda opposite Idina Menzel on Broadway?

source.notes: Cameos in the 2024 film alongside Menzel.

questions.q: Which Hollywood legend plays the Wonderful Wizard of Oz in the 2024 film?

source.notes: Plays the Wizard as an eccentric showman-huckster.

questions.q: Which acclaimed actress plays the scheming Madame Morrible in the 2024 film?

source.notes: Won Best Actress for Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022).

questions.q: At which fictional university do Elphaba and Glinda first meet as roommates?

source.notes: A boarding school in Gillikin Country.

questions.q: Who wrote the book (libretto) for the stage musical Wicked?

source.notes: Co-wrote the 2024 film screenplay with Dana Fox.

questions.q: Who plays Elphaba's love interest Fiyero in the 2024 film?

source.notes: Also starred in Bridgerton.

questions.q: Which late-stage musical song do Elphaba and Glinda sing at their parting?

source.notes: 'I have been changed for good…'

questions.q: Peter Dinklage voices which bespectacled talking goat and history professor?

source.notes: Loses his ability to speak later in the story as Animals are oppressed.

questions.q: Who plays Elphaba's younger wheelchair-using sister Nessarose in the 2024 film?

source.notes: First wheelchair-using actress to play the part professionally.

questions.q: When is the sequel Wicked: For Good scheduled for theatrical release?

source.notes: Part 2 of the two-film adaptation of the stage musical.

questions.q: What is the character name of the Munchkin boy who loves Glinda in Wicked?

source.notes: Ultimately transformed into the Tin Man.

questions.q: What is the original subtitle of Gregory Maguire's 1995 novel Wicked?
choices: The Life and Times of the Wicked Witch of the West

source.notes: Spawned three sequels collectively known as 'The Wicked Years.'

questions.q: Who plays Boq in the 2024 Wicked film?

source.notes: Broadway star; originated the role of SpongeBob in the musical.

questions.q: Which song does Glinda sing to try to make Elphaba fit in socially?

source.notes: Iconic Act 1 showstopper.
